title: Conquest's Weapons Balance Patch
description: Attribute balancing for Conquest's Weapons with Attribute Setter
body: Some Weapons from Conquest's Medieval Armors and Weapons despite being made from their vanilla counterparts, were not well balanced. This mod updates each weapon class with different but balanced attributes, using Better Combat's status settings such as damage, attack speed and range. Eg. polearms have more reach. All weapons made from the same material have simmilar DPS, despite having different attributes to fit different playstyles.
